explanations.2: This line tells pre-commit to skip checking files in those three directories (the ^ means start of path, and | means 'or').
explanations.23: The args list here passes a command-line flag to the markdownlint tool telling it where to find its configuration file.
explanations.32: This line specifies the exact command that will run; it's needed here because this is a custom 'local' hook, not a standard pre-built one.
explanations.33: This declares that the hook runs a Node.js tool, so pre-commit knows to look for it in your Node environment rather than your system PATH.
explanations.45: This awk/yq command extracts only the YAML section between the first pair of --- lines in .qmd files, then validates that YAML syntax.
explanations.48: The {} gets replaced with each filename that matches, so the script processes files one at a time.
explanations.64: This exclusion pattern prevents the spell checker from looking inside the _extensions folder, which typically contains third-party code you don't want checked.
